title: Website Content Extractor Scraper
description: Extract structured content or clean markdown from one or more URLs.

urls.title: URLs
urls.description: Preferred batch input. Enter one or more page URLs to extract in a single actor run.

url.title: Single URL
url.description: Backward-compatible single URL input. Prefer URLs for batching.

include_html.title: Include Raw HTML
include_html.description: Include raw page HTML in JSON responses. Ignored when Response Type is Markdown.

response_type.title: Response Type
response_type.description: Choose JSON for structured extraction fields, or Markdown for clean page content.
